summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by replacing the old bullet/smoke animation in HeroSection.tsx with a new ShootingAnimation component. The implementation includes: a cartoon boy on the left, a bullseye target on the right, muzzle flash, bullet travel, target shake, hit flash, impact sparks, gun smoke, and a BANG! text pop — all via inline SVG and CSS keyframes. The animation is scoped to ~160px wide × 44px tall, fitting the compact size requirement. No external image assets are used. The old bullet-fly/bullet-smoke keyframes have been removed from index.css and moved inline. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
